claim.statement: A composed barrier cannot claim a stronger rung than its certified sub-barrier earned.
claim.negation_of: a composed certificate laundered above its weakest sub-barrier
claim.scope: one R3 sub-barrier plus an R0 composition step

rung.name: overdeclared-composite
trusted_base: this rung is intentionally too strong

one_directional: The runner computes min-trust and refuses the stronger declared rung.
